g.text: TLB Coherency: The Stale Entry Problem
1. Invalidate TLB entry BEFORE modifying PTE
2. Write back dirty/referenced bits on eviction
3. TLB miss after invalidation forces fresh page table walk

div.p: OS set valid=0 But TLB still has old entry!
BUG! Accesses PFN 42 But PFN 42 now contains completely different data!
Critical: Write back dirty bit to page_table BEFORE invalidating! Otherwise dirty data is lost.
